title: Thai Lobster Miso Stew
description: A rich and flavorful Thai-inspired stew featuring succulent lobster meat, savory miso paste, and aromatic spices.
instructions: In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the jamaican allspice and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the lobster meat and cook until lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the stew (chicken broth), coconut milk, fish sauce (if using), and miso paste. Whisk until the miso is dissolved.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook, covered, for 5-7 minutes or until the lobster is cooked through.
Stir in the chili flakes (if using) and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with scallions and basil leaves.
Serve with steamed rice or noodles, if desired.
